title: The Harvester
writer: Homer Croy, Robert Lee Johnson, Elizabeth Meehan
actors: Alice Brady, Russell Hardie, Ann Rutherford
plot: In a small town in Indiana in the 1890s, the domineering and ambitious Mrs. Biddle arranges a marriage between her spoiled daughter Thelma and the town's prize catch, harvester David Langston, who is wedded to the soil. David is f...
